xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheCompany: N. B. I. Industrial Finance Company Limited
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: The Company is a non-deposit taking non-banking financial company, primarily involved in investments in equity shares, equity-related securities and other securities etc. It does not have any customer interface.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsForGrievanceRedressalMe: It does not have any customer interface.
It does not have any customer interface.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: NBI stakeholders seek accountability for compliant, ethical and transparent business conduct.
A good talent pool will help NBI develop leadership capabilities among its employees and ensure continuity of business.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company encourages its employees to undertake functional and soft-skill training programs.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: - The global trend of investment is now inclined towards sustainable portfolios - Companies with good ESG /Sustainability performance are shown to be delivering better returns over the long term.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: The Company looks to invest in companies which demonstrate good ESG practices.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePoliciesExplanator: All the Policies are available on the website of the Company.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:SpecificCommitmentsGoalsAndTar: The Company has developed detailed action plans and goals for each of the material issues aligned with the NGRBC principles, these are detailed under the relevant principle in section C of this Report.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: The Company is deeply committed to achieving ESG-related objectives and continues to prioritize related agenda over the near and medium term. The Company’s focus on ESG parameters is best reflected through values that are imbibed in all spheres of activity of the Company
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: Corporate Social Responsibility Committee Details on: http://www.nbi-india.co.in/policies.shtml
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: During the year, the Board of Directors of the Company invested their time on various updates pertaining to the business, regulations, etc.
Anti-money laundering Anti-bribery and anti- corruption Whistle blower Prevention of Sexual Harassment at the Workplace
Anti-money laundering Anti-bribery and anti- corruption Whistle blower Prevention of Sexual Harassment at the Workplace
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Not applicable. The Company is engaged only in investment activities as a Non-Banking Financial Company and does not have any goods and raw materials utilization as a part of its products and services.

Not applicable. The Company is engaged only in investment activities as a Non-Banking Financial Company and does not have any goods and raw materials utilization as a part of its products and services.

Not applicable. The Company is engaged only in investment activities as a Non-Banking Financial Company and does not have any goods and raw materials utilization as a part of its products and services.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TheEntityHasNotApplicableCondu: Not applicable. The Company is engaged only in investment activities as a Non-Banking Financial Company and does not have any goods and raw materials utilization as a part of its products and services.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ThePremisesOrOfficesOfTheEntit: There are no differently abled employees in the employment of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TheEntityHasNotApplicableAnEqu: There are no differently abled employees in the employment of the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: Any employee having issues with /related to work may contact senior management freely.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: The Company provides a safe and healthy work place to its employees.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: There were no safety related incidents or significant risks/concerns related to health and safety.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMeasuresUndertakenByT: The Company does not have value chain partners.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: The key stake – holder groups have been identified by the Company through materiality exercise.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: The Company has always maintained that a constant and proactive engagement with key stakeholders enables the Company to better communicate its strategies and performance. A continuous engagement helps align expectations, thereby enabling the Company to better serve its stakeholders. The Board is provided with feedback from consultation from time to time by the senior management
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: The issues pertaining to economic, environmental and social topics have been identified and incorporated
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The Company is committed to maintaining a safe and harmonious business environment and work place for everyone irrespective of ethnicity, region, race, caste, gender, religion, disability sexual orientation etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: The Company has a Whistle Blower Policy to prevent adverse consequences to the complainant in discrimination and harassment cases.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AMechanismForZeroLiquidDischar: The Company is a non-banking financial co. and its direct emissions are very much limited.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: The Company is committed to contributing to the empowerment of institutions which serve the community
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: The Company does not have a customer interface as it is not involved in consumer product sale / distribution.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePolicyOnCyberSecur: . It is not hosted on the website of the Company
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WeblinkWhereInformationOnProdu: The Company is an investment company and does not deal in any consumer products.
